# tfe_scim_settings

Reads the current SCIM provisioning settings for the Terraform Enterprise instance.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether SCIM provisioning is enabled for the Terraform Enterprise instance.
- `id` (String) The ID of the SCIM settings. Always `scim`.
- `paused` (Boolean) Whether SCIM provisioning is paused for the Terraform Enterprise instance.
- `site_admin_group_display_name` (String) The display name of the group whose members are granted site admin privileges.
- `site_admin_group_scim_id` (String) The SCIM ID of the group whose members are granted site admin privileges.
